$comment: Committed index of every vendored sample in this repo. Consume this instead of walking for manifest.json: project-root samples keep their manifest under src/ and the sample root (this `dir`) is the only correct build root. `matrix: false` marks catalog-only data the QA matrix never builds (archived or intentionally-broken samples included on purpose).
